title: SpaceX Starship V3 Has Successful Static Fire
description: SpaceX had a successful static fire for the V3 Starship (starship 39). All 6 engines fired for the full duration. The Booster 19 was delayed til tomorrow. Full-duration static fire for the first time on Starship V3 pic.twitter.com/Q1HZIX53HB — SpaceX (@SpaceX) April 15, 2026
